query:
-- ============================================================
-- INVOICE 890122: Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre
-- Account: 94152 | Total ex-GST: $131.50
-- Line items:
--   DID Australia (1) x1 = $2.00
--   Standard Support NBN 50/20 x1 = $88.00
--   eFax x1 = $10.00
--   ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack x1 = $0.00 (bundled)
--   Call Centre Queue with Time of Day Routing x2 = $0.00
--   UCXcel Basic Queue Agent x1 = $0.00
--   UCXcel Essential x1 = $30.00
--   Voicemail x2 = $0.00
--   Variable: Australia - 13/1300 x5 = $1.50
-- ============================================================

-- Customer does NOT exist in DB - create it
INSERT INTO customers (externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount, unmatchedBillingCount, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        'active', 131.50, 9.00, 5, 0, NOW(), NOW());

-- Create the services for Mooloolaba Osteopathy
-- 1. NBN 50/20 internet service (ABB via SasBoss)
INSERT INTO services (externalId, planName, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, provider, status,
                      monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('MOMC_NBN', 'Standard Support NBN 50/20', 'Internet', 'NBN', 'SasBoss', 'active',
        73.69, 88.00, 'C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        '77 Mooloolaba ESP, MOOLOOLABA QLD 4557', NOW(), NOW());

-- 2. UCXcel Essential voice service
INSERT INTO services (externalId, planName, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, provider, status,
                      monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('MOMC_UCX', 'UCXcel Essential', 'Voice', 'UCX', 'SasBoss', 'active',
        9.00, 30.00, 'C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        '77 Mooloolaba ESP, MOOLOOLABA QLD 4557', NOW(), NOW());

-- 3. DID Australia (1)
INSERT INTO services (externalId, planName, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, provider, status,
                      monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('MOMC_DID', 'DID Australia (1)', 'Voice', 'DID', 'SasBoss', 'active',
        0.20, 2.00, 'C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        '77 Mooloolaba ESP, MOOLOOLABA QLD 4557', NOW(), NOW());

-- 4. eFax
INSERT INTO services (externalId, planName, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, provider, status,
                      monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('MOMC_FAX', 'eFax', 'Other', 'eFax', 'SasBoss', 'active',
        0.00, 10.00, 'C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        '77 Mooloolaba ESP, MOOLOOLABA QLD 4557', NOW(), NOW());

-- 5. ME Call Pack (bundled $0)
INSERT INTO services (externalId, planName, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, provider, status,
                      monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName, locationAddress, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('MOMC_CP', 'ME - 3 Included Local National Mobile Call Pack', 'Voice', 'Call Pack', 'SasBoss', 'active',
        0.00, 0.00, 'C_MOMC', 'Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre',
        '77 Mooloolaba ESP, MOOLOOLABA QLD 4557', NOW(), NOW());

-- ============================================================
-- INVOICE 890189: All Crops Haulage Pty Ltd
-- Account: 96148 | Total ex-GST: $149.00
-- Line items:
--   NBN 100/40 Service ID 13073719 AVC 000123456625 x1 = $114.00
--   4G Backup (SIM 8200094619069) x1 = $35.00
-- No variable charges
-- ============================================================

-- All Crops Haulage (C0010) has 4 services - issues:
-- S0765 (Data - Internet, SasBoss) = $0 cost, $114 revenue → correct revenue, fix planName
-- S0766 (Other, SasBoss) = $49 cost, $35 revenue → 4G Backup, cost should be lower
-- SSPVNO3A (Internet 100/40, SasBoss) = $49 cost, $149 revenue → DUPLICATE of S0765+S0766 combined
-- S0258 (Business Data Plan S, Telstra) = $10 cost, $0 revenue → separate Telstra service

-- Fix S0765: This is the NBN 100/40 service - update planName and cost
UPDATE services SET
  planName = 'NBN 100/40',
  serviceTypeDetail = 'NBN',
  monthlyCost = '49.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '114.00',
  locationAddress = '28672 Bruce HWY, CHILDERS QLD 4660',
  connectionId = 'AVC000123456625',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0765';

-- Fix S0766: This is the 4G Backup - update planName and cost
UPDATE services SET
  planName = '4G Backup',
  serviceTypeDetail = '4G Backup',
  serviceType = 'Other',
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '35.00',
  locationAddress = '28672 Bruce HWY, CHILDERS QLD 4660',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0766';

-- SSPVNO3A appears to be a SasBoss-level bundle record that duplicates S0765+S0766
-- The invoice shows only 2 line items totalling $149 - SSPVNO3A has $149 revenue which is the bundle total
-- Mark SSPVNO3A as terminated/duplicate since S0765+S0766 now correctly represent the services
UPDATE services SET
  status = 'terminated',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Duplicate of S0765+S0766 per invoice 890189 analysis'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSPVNO3A';

-- Recalculate All Crops Haulage customer totals
UPDATE customers SET
  monthlyCost = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyCost), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0010' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  monthlyRevenue = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0010' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  serviceCount = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0010' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'C0010';

-- Verify both customers
SELECT externalId, name, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost,
  ROUND((CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / NULLIF(CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,2)),0) * 100, 2) AS marginPercent,
  serviceCount
FROM customers WHERE externalId IN ('C_MOMC', 'C0010');
